items.name: Íslenski sjómannasnakkið
items.description: Hákarl borinn fram með íslensku brennivíni. Fermented shark served with Icelandic Brennivín.

items.name: Íslensk kjötsúpa
items.description: Hefðbundin lambasúpa með rótargrænmeti, brauði og smjöri. Traditional Icelandic lamb soup with root vegetables, bread, and butter.

items.name: Rjómalöguð humarsúpa
items.description: Humar, rjómi, brauð og smjör. Creamy lobster soup with lobster, served with bread and butter.

items.name: Brauðkarfa
items.description: Ferskt brauð með smjöri. Basket of fresh bread with butter.

items.name: Marineruð hrefna
items.description: Með teriyaki sósu, sætum kartöflu frönskum og brúnsósu. Marinated minke whale with teriyaki sauce, sweet potato fries and brown sauce.

items.name: Sterkar tigrísrækjur
items.description: Steiktar með lauk, tómötum og ristöðu brauði. Spicy tiger shrimps fried with onion and tomato, served with toast.

items.name: Kjúklingavængir og mozzarella stangir
items.description: Með hvítlauksósu. Chicken wings and mozzarella sticks served with garlic sauce.

items.name: Cheddar ostasalat
items.description: Með kirsuberjatómötum, beikoni, rauðlauk og jalapeño í majónessósu með saltkexi. Cheddar cheese salad with cherry tomatoes, bacon, red onion, and jalapeño in mayonnaise sauce with crackers.

items.name: Sætar kartöflu franskar / Sweet potato fries
Duus kjúklingasalat með BBQ kjúkling
items.description: Doritos, kál, paprika, tómötum, gúrku, rauðlauk, fetaosti, hnetum og hvítlauksósu. Duus chicken salad with BBQ Chicken, Doritos, lettuce, paprika, tomatoes, cucumber, red onion, feta cheese, peanuts and garlic sauce.

items.name: Caesar salat
items.description: Með steiktum kjúkling, kál, brauðteningum, parmesan osti og heimagerðri Caesarsósu. Caesar salad with fried chicken, lettuce, croutons, parmesan cheese and homemade Caesar dressing.

items.name: Silungssalat
items.description: Ofnbakaður silungur með beikoni, káli, gúrku, tómötum, rauðlauk, papríku, möndluflögum og tartarsósu. Trout salad with baked trout, bacon, lettuce, cucumber, tomatoes, red onion, almond flakes and tartar sauce.

items.name: Ofnbakaður lax
items.description: Með mangó jalapeño sósu, spínati, kartöflugratin og béarnaise sósu. Oven baked salmon with mango jalapeño sauce, spinach, potato gratin and béarnaise sauce.

items.name: Ofnbakaður þorskur
items.description: Með grænmeti, sprengispökkluk, lauk, kartöflum og sítrónudillsósu. Oven baked cod with vegetables, pan fried onion, potatoes and lemon dill sauce.

items.name: Djúpsteiktur fiskur
items.description: Með salati, frönskum og heimagerðri tartarsósu. Fish and chips with salad, fries and homemade tartar sauce.

items.name: Fiskur dagsins
items.description: Spyrjið þjóninn. Með grænmeti, kartöflum, rækum og rjómalagaðri sólþurrkaðri tómatsósu. Fish of the day (ask the waiter) with vegetables, potatoes, shrimps and creamy sun-dried tomato sauce.

items.name: Fiskitríó að hætti Duus
items.description: Með þremur tegundum af fiski, ásamt rækjum, á tígnarlegum tréplatta með kartöflum, grænmeti og sósu. Fish Trio á la Duus with three types of fish, shrimps, served on a wooden platter with potatoes, vegetables and sauce.

items.name: Kóstakóngurinn
items.description: Einstakur platti með fjórum tegundum af fiski eldaður með brennandi ástriki og nákvæmni. The King of the Ocean — 4 types of fish with vegetables, potatoes, shrimps and two kinds of sauces.

food.title: Pasta
food.note: Allir pastaréttir eru bornir fram með hvítlaukbrauði og Parmesan osti. All pasta dishes are served with garlic bread and Parmesan cheese.

items.name: Humar- og rækjupasta
items.description: Steikt í hvítlauksmjöri með spínati og humarsósu. Lobster and shrimp pasta cooked in garlic butter with spinach.

items.name: Kjúklinga- og beikonpasta
items.description: Með spínati og rjómasósu. Chicken and bacon pasta with spinach and creamy sauce.

items.name: Sveppa- og beikonpasta
items.description: Í rjómalagaðri sólþurrkaðri tómatsósu. Mushroom and bacon pasta in creamy sun-dried tomato sauce.

items.name: Kjötplatti
items.description: Lambakótílettur, Teriyaki BBQ ríf og nautasteik með kartöflum, brokkolíni, maísströng og béarnaisesósu. Meat Platter with Lamb chops, Teriyaki BBQ ribs and beef steak. Min. 2 pers.

items.name: Grillúð nautasteik
items.description: Með stektum kartöflum, maísströng og béarnaisesósu. Grilled beef steak with potatoes, corn on the cob and Béarnaise sauce.

items.name: Grillaó lambafillet
items.description: Með kartöflugratín, brokkolíni, hunangsgúlrótum og béarnaisesósu. Grilled Lamb Fillet with potato gratin, broccoli, honey-glazed carrots and Béarnaise sauce.

items.name: BBQ svínaríf
items.description: Með sveita frönskum og gúrkusalati. BBQ pork ribs with country fries and cucumber salad.

items.name: Grillaðar lambakótílettur
items.description: Með smaleki, brokkolíni, hunangsgúlrótum og brúnsósu. Grilled lamb chops with roasted baby potatoes, broccoli, honey-glazed carrots and brown sauce.

items.name: Teriyaki marineruð hrefna
items.description: Með stektri papríku, sveppum, lauk, sætum frönskum og brúnsósu. Teriyaki marinated minke whale with fried mushrooms, paprika, onions, sweet fries and brown sauce.

items.name: Grillúð ofnbökuð kjúklingabringa
items.description: Með spínati, osti, sveita frönskum og rjómalagaðri sólþurrkaðri tómatsósu. Grilled chicken breast with spinach, cheese, country fries and creamy sun-dried tomato sauce.

items.name: Linsubaunapottréttir með grænmeti
items.description: Borinn fram með salati, hrísgrjónum og ristöðu brauði. Lentil stew with vegetables served with salad, rice and toast.

items.name: Svepparagú pasta
items.description: Með sveppum, grænmeti, ristöðu brauði og salati. Mushroom ragu pasta with mushrooms, vegetables, served with toast and salad.

food.title: Borgarar / Burgers
food.note: Allir borgarar eru 120 g og bornir fram með frönskum eða sætum frönskum. All burgers are 120 g and served with fries or sweet potato fries.

items.name: Bói Special
items.description: Með osti, beikoni, skinku, rauðlauk, káli, gúrku, tómötum, ananas, spæluðu eggi, laukhringjum og hamborgarasósu. Bói Special with cheese, bacon, ham, red onion, lettuce, cucumber, tomato, pineapple, fried egg, onion rings and burger sauce.

items.name: Ostborgari
items.description: Með osti, káli, gúrku, tómat og hamborgarasósu. Cheeseburger with cheese, lettuce, cucumbers, tomato and burger sauce.

food.title: Barnamatsedill / Kids Menu
food.note: Fyrir 12 ára og yngri / For 12 years old and under.

items.name: Ostborgari
items.description: Með frönskum og tómatsósu. Cheeseburger with fries and ketchup.

items.name: Ofnabakalt kjúklingaleggir
items.description: Með frönskum og tómatsósu. Oven baked chicken legs with fries and ketchup.

items.name: Rjómalagað ostapasta með kjúkling
items.description: Creamy cheesy pasta with chicken.

items.name: Djúpsteiktur fiskur
items.description: Með frönskum og tómatsósu. Deep fried fish with fries and ketchup.

items.name: Pepsi / Pepsi Max / Fanta / Fanta no sugar

drinks.title: Kaffi og aðrir drykkir / Coffee & Drinks

items.name: Kaffi venjulegur með áfyllingu
items.description: Regular coffee with free refills.

items.name: Heitt kakó með rjóma
items.description: Hot Chocolate with Cream.

items.name: Glas af mjólk
items.description: Glass of Milk.

items.name: Einstök Pale Ale
items.description: American & Bavarian craft fused, with Icelandic water.

items.name: Icelandic Fish Soup
items.description: Creamy soup with fresh catch of the day, served with homemade bread. A local favorite.

items.name: Arctic Char Tartare
items.description: Fresh arctic char with capers, dill mustard and crispy bread.

items.name: Langoustine Tails
items.description: Pan-seared langoustine with garlic butter and fresh herbs.

items.name: Shrimp Cocktail
items.description: Fresh shrimp served on a bed of lettuce with our house-made cocktail sauce.

items.name: Grilled Atlantic Cod
items.description: Herb-crusted cod with seasonal vegetables and lemon butter.

items.name: Pan-Fried Arctic Char
items.description: With roasted root vegetables and brown butter sauce.

items.name: Lobster Feast
items.description: Whole langoustine with garlic butter, fries and salad.

items.name: Fish & Chips
items.description: Beer-battered fresh catch with fries and homemade tartar sauce.

items.name: Lamb Fillet
items.description: Icelandic lamb with thyme jus, potato gratin and vegetables.

items.name: Beef Tenderloin
items.description: With pepper sauce, roasted potatoes and seasonal greens.

items.name: Free Range Chicken
items.description: Herb-roasted chicken with wild mushroom risotto.

items.name: BBQ Pork Ribs
items.description: Slow-cooked ribs with country fries and cucumber salad.

items.name: Skúffukaka
items.description: Traditional Icelandic chocolate cake with coconut glaze.

items.name: Crème Brûlée
items.description: Classic vanilla custard with caramelized sugar.

items.name: Berry Skyr Mousse
items.description: Light skyr mousse with wild Icelandic berries.

items.name: Chocolate Lava Cake
items.description: Warm chocolate cake with a molten center, served with vanilla ice cream.
